Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

SpTU 5, 299 [sale of field][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

GARIN ⸢raq⸣-[qa]-⸢at ki⸣-šad 2 ša₂ ki-šub-ba-aʾ ša₂ US₂.SA.DU

(o 1) A meadow of the river-flats on the second bank of the waste field which (is) adjacent to a narrow street and adjacent to the house of Eriba, son of Kinaya and to the house of Balaṭi, son of Nabu-..., (meadow) which Eriba, son of Kinaya, descendant of Gimil-Nanaya, received from the hands of Labaši, son of Šamaš-ah-iddin and (of) Iqubu, son of Bazuzu.

o 22

su-⸢u⸣-qi₂ qat₂-nu u US₂.SA.DU E₂ meri-ba

o 33

⸢A⸣-šu₂ ⸢ša₂⸣ mki-na-a u₃ E₂ mba-la-ṭi A-šu₂ ša₂ mdNA₃!—RU

o 44

⸢ša₂⸣ meri-ba A-šu₂ ša₂ mki-na-a A mŠU—dna-na-a ina ŠU-MIN

o 55

mla-ba-ši A-šu₂ ša₂ mdUTU—ŠEŠ—MU u₃ mi-qu-bu

o 66

A-šu₂ ša₂ mba-zu-zu im-ḫu-ru mDINGIR—dan-nu—ŠEŠ-šu₂—ib-ni!

(o 6) Ilu-dannu-ahšu-ibni, son of Šamaš-eriba, was attending for testimony when these sealed sale documents (were written) .

o 77

A-šu₂ ša₂ mdUTU—SU ina na₄KIŠIB GANBA MU-MEŠ

o 88

[a]-⸢na!⸣ lu₂mu-kin-nu-⸢u₂⸣-tu ina lib₃-bi a-ši-ib

(2 lines blank)
Reverse
r 1r 1

[lu₂mu]-⸢kin⸣-nu mšu-la-a A!-šu₂ ša₂ mmu-un-šu-tur-GAL-šu₂-nu

(r 1) Witnesses: Šulaya, son of PN; Anu-uballiṭ, son of Imbiya, descendant of Kidin-Marduk; Šamaš-iqišanni, son of Pirʾu, descendant of Ekur-zakir; Šamaš-haṣib, son of Anu-ahhe-iddin, descendant of Šangi-Marduk; Anu-kaṣir, son of Balaṭu, descendant of Imbi-Anu; Libluṭ, son of Šamaš-reʾušunu, descendant of Rim-Anu; Anu-ah-iddin, son of Šamaš-kaṣir, descendant of Dabibi.

r 22

[m]d60—DIN A-šu₂ ša₂ mim-⸢bi-ia⸣ A mki-din—dAMAR.UTU

r 33

[m]dUTU—BAša₂-an-ni A-šu₂ ša₂ mpir-ʾu A mE₂.KUR—za-⸢kir⸣

r 44

mdUTU—ḫa-ṣib A-šu₂ ša₂ md60—ŠEŠ-MEŠ—MU A mlu₂SANGA—d<<ša₂-lid>>-AMAR.UTU

r 55

md60—KAD₂ A-šu₂ ša₂ m⸢ba-la-ṭu₂⸣ A mim-bi—da-nu

r 66

mlib-luṭ A-šu₂ ša₂ mdUTU—SIPA-šu-nu A mAM—d60

r 77

md60—ŠEŠ—MU A-šu₂ ša₂ mdUTU—KAD₂ A mda-bi-bi

r 88

lu₂UMBISAG mšu-la-a A-šu₂ ša₂ mdUTU—NUMUN—DU₃ ⸢A⸣ mNAM—da-nu

(r 8) Scribe: Šulaya, son of Šamaš-zer-ibni, descendant of Rim-Anu. Uruk, the month Simanu, 5th day, 6th year of Xerxes, king of the Persians, the Medes, of Babylon and of all the lands.

r 99

UNUGki itiSIG₄ U₄ 5-KAM₂ MU 6-KAM₂ mḫi-še-mar-šu₂

r 1010

LUGAL par-su lu₂ma-da-a-a Eki u KUR.KUR
